results.rendered_html: adharīkṛ 8 U., adharayati Den. P. To surpass, excel, beat down, worst; śokaṃ kiṃcidadharīkṛtya  Dk. 6  lessening, forgetting; to defeat, vanquish; bhavatā dhīratayā'dharīkṛtaḥ  Ki. 2. 40 , 6. 21 ; caritairmunīnadharayañśucibhiḥ  Ki. 6. 24  excelling; adharīkṛtasarvasnehena apatyapremṇā  K. 25.
